name: the-flx
documentation:

[![Release](https://img.shields.io/github/tag/the-flx/flx.py.svg?label=release&logo=github)](https://github.com/the-flx/flx.py/releases/latest)

# flx.py
> Rewrite emacs-flx in Python

[![CI](https://github.com/the-flx/flx.py/actions/workflows/test.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/the-flx/flx.py/actions/workflows/test.yml)

## 🔨 Usage

```py
import flx

print(flx.score("switch-to-buffer", "stb).score)  # 237
```

## 🛠️ Development

This project uses [PyTest][] to do the unit tests.

Simply run `pytest` to run and discover tests:

```sh
$ pytest
```

## ⚜️ License

`flx.py` is distributed under the terms of the MIT license.

See [`LICENSE`](./LICENSE) for details.

functions.name: flx.flx.word_p
documentation: Check if `ch` is a word character.

functions.name: flx.flx.capital_p
documentation: Check if `ch` is an uppercase character.

functions.name: flx.flx.boundary_p
documentation:
Check if LAST-CHAR is the end of a word and CHAR the start of the next.

This function is camel-case aware.

functions.name: flx.flx.inc_vec
documentation: Increment each element in `vec` between `beg` and `end` by `inc`.

functions.name: flx.flx.get_hash_for_string
documentation:
Return hash-table for string where keys are characters.

Value is a sorted list of indexes for character occurrences.

functions.name: flx.flx.get_heatmap_str
documentation:
Generate the heatmap vector of string.

See documentation for logic.

functions.name: flx.flx.biggger_sublist
documentation:
Return sublist bigger than `val` from sorted `sorted-list`.

If `val` is nil, return entire list.

functions.name: flx.flx.find_best_match
documentation:
Recursively compute the best match for a string, passed as `str_info` and
`heatmap`, according to `query`.
